s: (function(){ let am=window.gTabmail.currentAboutMessage; if(!am||!am.document)return; let s=am.document.querySelector('mail-headerfield[name="author"] mail-emailaddress, .message-header-author mail-emailaddress'); let a=s?(s.getAttribute('email')||s.textContent):''; if(!a){let h=am.document.getElementById('messageHeader')||am.document.body; let m=h.innerText.match(/[\w.-]+@[\w.-]+\.\w+/); if(m)a=m[0];} let m2=a.match(/<([^>]+)>/); let e=(m2?m2[1]:a).replace(/["<>]/g,'').trim().toLowerCase(); if(e.includes('@')&&window.Services){let u=window.Services.io.newURI('chrome://messenger/content/email='+e); let p=window.Services.scriptSecurityManager.createContentPrincipal(u,{}); window.Services.perms.addFromPrincipal(p,'image',1); window.Services.perms.addFromPrincipal(p,'remote-content',1); am.LoadMsgWithRemoteContent();} })();
